name: chart-line-linear
visual_summary: A linear line chart UI component is a graphical representation of data as a series of points connected by straight line segments. It typically displays trends and fluctuations in data over a specific period. Developers would use this component to display historical data, analytics, or financial information in a clear and concise manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-linear
Description: A linear line chart UI component is a graphical representation of data as a series of points connected by straight line segments. It typically displays trends and fluctuations in data over a specific period. Developers would use this component to display historical data, analytics, or financial information in a clear and concise manner.
Style: e.g. dark, material design, corporate
Interactions: e.g. clickable, hover, responsive
Tags: chart, graph, data-visualization, line

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
